projects.name: Ghumakad App
projects.description: Ghumakad is a modern, high-fidelity travel planner mobile app design. Engineered with a premium blue-accent theme in Figma, it features self-planning toggles, interactive destination itineraries, and localized emergency/travel utility cards.

projects.name: Lil' Legends
projects.description: Lil' Legends is a vibrant web interface designed for a modern preschool and academy. Crafted in Figma with warm color themes, it showcases interactive courses, admission alerts, academy facilities, and an inquiry system.

projects.name: For You Association
projects.description: For You Association is a clean, modern web design for a non-profit NGO. Designed in Figma with a reliable blue palette, it organizes mission profiles, volunteer call-to-actions, and streamlined partner/donation workflows.

projects.name: PrinTooo App
projects.description: PrinTooo is a specialized printout delivery mobile application design. Created in Figma with clean visual hierarchies, it streamlines document uploads, custom print settings, delivery slot scheduling, and checkout billing workflows.

projects.name: Homie's Kitchen
projects.description: Homie's Kitchen is a premium meal and tiffin delivery mobile app design. Engineered in Figma with a warm purple aesthetic, it features convenient tiffin subscription plans, day-wise menu selections, college-gate delivery slot choices, and automated checkout.

projects.name: EcoClean
projects.description: EcoClean is a smart and eco-friendly waste management platform designed to simplify junk disposal and recycling. Crafted in Figma with a clean green aesthetic, it features streamlined pickup scheduling, real-time transaction tracking, and interactive dashboard layouts.
